notable_excerpts: Our waste management practices were recognized with the ‘Diamond Standard’ for achieving 99.9% of waste diversion from landfills.

Our formulations facility at Srikakulam, FTO-11, became India’s first pharmaceutical facility to receive a ‘Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design (LEED) Platinum certification’ for existing buildings from the US Green Building Council.

In partnership with Unitaid, Clinton Health Access Initiative, and Wits RHI, we are working to make Lenacapavir, a long-acting HIV prevention tool, accessible and affordable in low-and middle-income countries.
The GMP and Pre-Approval Inspection (PAI) conducted by the USFDA in July 2025 at our formulations manufacturing facility, FTO 11, has been formally closed.
We have received the Establishment Inspection Report (EIR), with the inspection outcome categorized as 'VAI'.

chain_of_thought: The environmental disclosures are strong, highlighting significant achievements in waste management and energy efficiency. Social aspects focus on community engagement and healthcare access, though less detailed. Governance mentions are centered around regulatory compliance and risk management, with a focus on inspections and outcomes.
strengths: Strong environmental performance with LEED certification and waste management.
Commitment to healthcare access in low-and middle-income countries.
weaknesses: Limited detail on social initiatives beyond healthcare access.
